minting_now.name: Full Grown
minting_now.description:
A body at thirty, blooming twice— once in memory, once in becoming.

A 24-hour open edition released on the artist's 30th birthday. Companion piece to Growing Apart (2022) and Melting Flowers.

minting_now.name: Flicker #26
minting_now.description:
In 1992, a scorched floppy disk was recovered from the ruins of a cybercafé fire.
Its only surviving file: mc-death.exe

No one knows who made it. No one knows what it does.

But those who run it see things. Feel things.

This is not a PFP project. It’s a corrupted transmission.

64 digital skulls.
